loop1.title: Thermal Life
loop1.note: Showing total active power as a proxy for thermal loss — winding temperature, oil temperature, and thermal stress are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing load factor trend (active_power_total_kw) — temperature sensors (hotspot, oil, winding) are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Life & Capacity
loop1.note: Showing load factor as proxy for thermal stress — insulation aging and nameplate ratings are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Insulation Aging & Loss of Life
loop1.note: Showing aging factor and loss of life derived from active power — temperature and direct aging metrics are not measured by this asset; hotspot temperature is omitted.
